_comment: Mainnet listing restraint overlay (PRD_23 §8.5 · MAINNET_READINESS C-1-F). Applied only when NEXT_PUBLIC_LISTING_MODE='true' (production cafepi). English is the primary review language and also serves as the fallback overlay for all non-ko locales. Principle: token/issuance/economy wording -> points/grant (removes 'non-Pi Tokens' impression, requirement A-5).

whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implements PiRC1 (Bean Points) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transactions).
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Grants = Circulation + Retrieval) is constantly verified. Over-granting and double-spending are structurally impossible.

form.priceConvertHint: If you enter in local currency, the Pi price is set using the reference conversion rate at the time of registration.
form.priceQuoteFail: Could not fetch the reference rate. Please enter the Pi amount directly.
form.priceQuoteRequired: Please save after the reference conversion is complete.

dashboard.identityMismatch: Warning: Bean identity mismatch - granted({issued}) != circulating({circulating}) + collected({collected}). Check DB.

wallets.mintDesc: Subsidy grant without cash (Pi) - funding for reward campaigns. Included in the balance-sheet grant total (not revenue).
wallets.mintAmountError: Grant amount must be an integer of 1 or more

adminCampaign.mintNote: Subsidy grant without cash (Pi) - recorded in bean_mint_log and added to the balance-sheet grant total
adminCampaign.mintAmountError: Grant amount must be an integer of 1 or more

adminFeeMode.subtitle: Switch the platform fee/reward settlement unit: Bean Points ⇄ Pi Coin (1:100). Mainnet listing A-5 response - switch and revert instantly with one button.
adminFeeMode.beanModeDesc: Bean Points fee plan (normal - Bean deduction)

apiErrors.ADM_MINT_AMT_MIN: Grant amount (bean_amt) must be an integer of 1 or more
apiErrors.STORE_FX_UNAVAILABLE: Could not fetch the reference rate. Please enter directly in Pi.
